THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS1_EPOCH.title: Die Anywhere Else
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS1_EPOCH.descrip:
A young corvus leaves home. There's no reason for [jitter]him[/jitter] to stay.

The desert is cold and the night is long. [jitter]He[/jitter] will not survive it. Scared as [jitter]he[/jitter] is, it comes as a relief.

[jitter]He[/jitter] cannot bear to be this [red]thing[/red] any longer.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS1_EPOCH.unlock:
The [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color] shapes her own fate.
[red]Ascensions[/red] are available when starting a run.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS1_EPOCH.unlockI: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS2_EPOCH.title: Wolf Like Me
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS2_EPOCH.descrip:
Though she's only a novice, the [orange]blademaster[/orange] takes a liking to her. She's quick and tricky, more than most of his men. And perhaps she puts in some effort to catch his eye.

"One more round, and I'm certain I can best you. We'll make a wager of it."

"And what do you have that I would care to wager for?"

Her hips [sine][color=B18AFF]sway[/color][/sine] as she steps closer. "Do I truly need to tell you?"
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS2_EPOCH.unlockI: {IsRevealed:Killed|Kill} [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS3_EPOCH.title: The Price of Doing Business
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS3_EPOCH.descrip:
The [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color] once swore she would stand for those like her. The outcast and the orphaned. But the [red]company[/red] fights only for the highest bidder.

For years she tears away at herself, trying to be what is asked of her. She succeeds. And once again she becomes [red]something she can't bear[/red].
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS3_EPOCH.unlockI: {IsRevealed:Killed|Kill} [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS4_EPOCH.title: The Fall
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS4_EPOCH.descrip:
"Was it worth it? Stabbing your comrades in the back for some useless [jitter]peasants[/jitter]?"

The [red]blood[/red] in her beak would choke her response, if she thought [orange]he[/orange] deserved one.

"If you're lucky, you'll still be alive when the guards come. It's the last [blue]mercy[/blue] I'll ever give you."
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS4_EPOCH.unlockI: {IsRevealed:Played|Play} a run with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS5_EPOCH.title: Light Up the Night
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS5_EPOCH.descrip:
There was precisely one good thing about prison: it gave her time to [blue]think[/blue]. But she's had her fill. She knows [purple]who she needs to be[/purple]. And there's no way to become her locked away in a cell.

[color=B18AFF]"Let's dance, girls."[/color]
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS5_EPOCH.unlockI: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS6_EPOCH.title: Gods
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS6_EPOCH.descrip:
"What do you figure [red]he's[/red] planning up there in that tower?"

"The same as any [orange]petty tyrant[/orange]: whatever he wants. Until [color=B18AFF]somebody[/color] tells him he can't."
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS6_EPOCH.unlockI: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS7_EPOCH.title: Baby, I'm an Anarchist!
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS7_EPOCH.descrip:
"Your [orange]old boss[/orange] sounds like a real piece of work. And you ended up doing this instead of lookin' for revenge?"

The [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color] reaches for the [purple]book[/purple] she keeps near her heart. "It's fascinating, the literature that gets passed between prisoners."

"Oh, I get it. You read a book and now you're on some peace and love and forgiveness stuff."

"When it's warranted. I am still a fighter. But I've learned to fight for what matters."
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERESS7_EPOCH.unlockI: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [color=B18AFF]Sorceress[/color]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
